name: Xbox 360

bios.notes: Xenia does not use the same BIOS workflow as many disc-console emulators, but game content format and compatibility are highly title-dependent.

notes: Do not transform ISO, GOD, or extracted XEX layouts automatically; format conversion can be destructive or tool-specific.

notes: Keep Xbox 360 repairs limited to read-only diagnosis and user-approved dry-run plans.
